text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky's hard work has taken its toll on her, so
I bring her to the infirmary to rest up.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All the resting I do and I end up like this...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But if this time off is authorized, who am I to say
no to a chance at napping?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Oh boy. What's going on here? Looks like I'm
lost in some kinda weird new world.

text_block_list.name: God of Cats
text_block_list.text:
Meow... Welcome, Seiun Sky. I am the God of
Cats.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa! A talking cat!

text_block_list.name: God of Cats
text_block_list.text: Seiun Sky, it appears you treat your feline friends with re meow kable kindness.

text_block_list.name: God of Cats
text_block_list.text:
In exchange for that kindness, I shall grant you
one wish. Now, what would make your heart
purrrr?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... Can I think about it while I rub your belly?

text_block_list.name: God of Cats
text_block_list.text: You need not ask for my purrrmission.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Wow, your coat's so fluffy. No wonder you're
a god.

text_block_list.name: God of Cats
text_block_list.text: Purrrr... Now, your wish...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Floofy, floofy.

text_block_list.name: God of Cats
text_block_list.text: Your w-wish... Purrrr... Purrrrr...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nya-ha-ha! And your belly's not the only place
that's soft! You're real fluffy under your chin too.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Mmm. That's what I call a nap. Feels like I had a
wonderful dream...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, I'm so light on my feet... Guess there's no
way I can skip practice if I'm feeling this good,
huh?

It looks like Seiun Sky managed to leave the
infirmary in fairly high spirits.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
All right, time for a tummy rub using my
patented, secret technique! How's this?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Okay, then how about a chin scratch?! And
a pat on the rear!

text_block_list.name: God of Cats
text_block_list.text:
...A sorry purrformance! Have you learned nothing
from your experience floofing cats?!

text_block_list.name: God of Cats
text_block_list.text: You meowst restart your training from the very beginning! Hissss!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Gah!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I just had a terrible, soul-crushing
nightmare.

It looks like Seiun Sky had a bad dream that kept
her from getting much rest.
